versions.version_description: The chords are unusual but accurate so you must use the ones that are outlined at the start, using any other variations won't sound right. No capo is needed and tuning is a Half-Step Down (Eb tuning).
This version sounds like the studio version and uses the same chord variants. Enjoy.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
ROCK WITH YOU
by Michael Jackson
*from 'Off the Wall' (1979)*

*CAPO 1st FRET*

(Original Key: Ebm)


[Intro]

[ch]Dm9[/ch]  [ch]F/G[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]Dm9[/ch]  [ch]G/A[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]
[ch]Dm9[/ch]  [ch]F/G[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]F/G[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]F/G[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]


[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]Dm9[/ch]    [ch]F/G[/ch]              [ch]G/A[/ch]
 Girl, close your eyes; let that rhythm get into you.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm9[/ch]           [ch]F/G[/ch]                   [ch]G/A[/ch]
 Don't try to fight it; there ain't nothin' that you can do.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]       [ch]Em7[/ch]   [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]         [ch]F/G[/ch]
 Relax your mind;  lay back, and groove with mine.[/tab]


[Bridge 1]

[tab]           [ch]Dm7[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
You got to feel the heat, and we can ride the boogie,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]    [ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
 Share that beat of love.[/tab]


[Chorus 1]
 
[tab]        [ch]Dm9[/ch]             [ch]G/A[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
I wanna rock with you, (all night),[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm9[/ch]                   [ch]G/A[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]
 Dance you into day, (sun-light).[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Dm9[/ch]              [ch]G/A[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
I wanna rock with you, (all night),[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F/G[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]F/G[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
We're gonna rock the night away.[/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]Dm9[/ch]         [ch]F/G[/ch]                [ch]G/A[/ch]
 Out on the floor; there ain't nobody there but us,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm9[/ch]             [ch]F/G[/ch]              [ch]G/A[/ch]
 Girl, when you dance, there's a magic that must be love.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]         [ch]Em7[/ch]   [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]         [ch]F/G[/ch]
 Just take it slow, 'cos we got so far to go.[/tab]


[Bridge 2]

[tab]           [ch]Dm7[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
You got to feel the heat, and we can ride the boogie,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]    [ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
 Share that beat of love.[/tab]


[Chorus 2]

[tab]        [ch]Dm9[/ch]              [ch]G/A[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
I wanna rock with you, (all night),[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm9[/ch]                   [ch]G/A[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]
 Dance you into day, (sun-light).[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Dm9[/ch]             [ch]G/A[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
I wanna rock with you, (all night),[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F/G[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]F/G[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
We're gonna rock the night away.[/tab]


[Middle 8]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                               [ch]D9[/ch]
 And when the groove is dead and gone, (yeah),[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]    [ch]C/E[/ch]
You know that love sur-vives;[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]   [ch]F/G[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]  ([ch]Dm9[/ch])
So we can rock for-ev -er, on.[/tab]


[Interlude]

[ch]Dm9[/ch]  [ch]F/G[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]Dm9[/ch]  [ch]G/A[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]
[ch]Dm9[/ch]  [ch]F/G[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                               [ch]C#[/ch]
 I wanna rock with you, I wanna groove with you.[/tab]

*KEY CHANGE*
------------


[Chorus 3]

[tab]        [ch]D#m9[/ch]            [ch]G#/A#[/ch] [ch]A#[/ch]
I wanna rock with you, (all   night),[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#m9[/ch]                  [ch]G#/A#[/ch] [ch]B[/ch]
 Dance you into day, (sun  -light).[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D#m9[/ch]            [ch]G#/A#[/ch] [ch]A#[/ch]
I wanna rock with you, (all   night),[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#/G#[/ch]      [ch]G#[/ch]         [ch]F#/G#[/ch]  [ch]G#[/ch]
 Dance the night away.[/tab]


[Chorus 4]

[tab]        [ch]D#m9[/ch]            [ch]G#/A#[/ch] [ch]A#[/ch]
I wanna rock with you, (all   night),[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#m9[/ch]                 [ch]G#/A#[/ch] [ch]B[/ch]
 Rock you into day, (sun  -light).[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D#m9[/ch]           [ch]G#/A#[/ch] [ch]A#[/ch]
I wanna rock with you, (all   night),[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#/G#[/ch]     [ch]G#[/ch]         [ch]F#/G#[/ch]  [ch]G#[/ch]
 Rock the night away.[/tab]

(Repeat to Fade)


CHORD DIAGRAMS:
---------------

   [ch]Dm9[/ch]     [ch]F/G[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]G/A[/ch]     [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]    [ch]Em7[/ch]   [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]

 EADGBE  EADGBE  EADGBE  EADGBE  EADGBE  EADGBE  EADGBE  EADGBE  EADGBE
 x5355x  303211  x02220  x00033  x13331  320003  x32010  022030  x13231

   [ch]Dm7[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]D9[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]C#[/ch]     [ch]D#m9[/ch]    [ch]F#/G#[/ch]   [ch]G#/A#[/ch]    [ch]G#[/ch]

 EADGBE  EADGBE  EADGBE  EADGBE  EADGBE  EADGBE  EADGBE  EADGBE  EADGBE
 xx0211  577555  x5455x  x35553  x46664  x6466x  4x432x  6665xx  466544


Tabbed by Joel from cLuMsY, Bristol, England, 2005 (clumsyband@hotmail.com)
